'''鈭歵h-w-b''' ('''thawaba''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:macadam|macadam]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-w-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:macadam|macadam]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-w-b
|-
! Lemma
| thawaba
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thawabithi|thawabithi]] || [[word:thawabiji|thawabiji]] || [[word:thawabishi|thawabishi]] || [[word:thawabi|thawabi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thawabuthuth|thawabuthuth]] || [[word:thawabujuj|thawabujuj]] || [[word:thawabushush|thawabushush]] || [[word:thawab|thawab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawabuthu|thawabuthu]] || [[word:thawabuju|thawabuju]] || [[word:thawabushu|thawabushu]] || [[word:thawabu|thawabu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawabufuth|thawabufuth]] || [[word:thawabufuj|thawabufuj]] || [[word:thawabufush|thawabufush]] || [[word:thawabuf|thawabuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thawabethe|thawabethe]] || [[word:thawabeje|thawabeje]] || [[word:thawabeshe|thawabeshe]] || [[word:thawabe|thawabe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thawabothoth|thawabothoth]] || [[word:thawabojoj|thawabojoj]] || [[word:thawaboshosh|thawaboshosh]] || [[word:thawab|thawab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawabotho|thawabotho]] || [[word:thawabojo|thawabojo]] || [[word:thawabosho|thawabosho]] || [[word:thawabo|thawabo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawabofoth|thawabofoth]] || [[word:thawabofoj|thawabofoj]] || [[word:thawabofosh|thawabofosh]] || [[word:thawabof|thawabof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thawab忙th忙|thawab忙th忙]] || [[word:thawab忙j忙|thawab忙j忙]] || [[word:thawab忙sh忙|thawab忙sh忙]] || [[word:thawab忙|thawab忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thawabathath|thawabathath]] || [[word:thawabajaj|thawabajaj]] || [[word:thawabashash|thawabashash]] || [[word:thawab|thawab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawabatha|thawabatha]] || [[word:thawabaja|thawabaja]] || [[word:thawabasha|thawabasha]] || [[word:thawaba|thawaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawabafath|thawabafath]] || [[word:thawabafaj|thawabafaj]] || [[word:thawabafash|thawabafash]] || [[word:thawabaf|thawabaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:thawabasha|thawabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gothawabasha|gothawabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokithawabasha|gokithawabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:thawabn眉sha|thawabn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gothawabnkn眉sha|gothawabnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokithawabn眉sha|gokithawabn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thawabsh毛sha|thawabsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothawabnksh毛sha|gothawabnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithawabsh毛sha|gokithawabsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thawabrosha|thawabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothawabnkrosha|gothawabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithawabrosha|gokithawabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thawabmusha|thawabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothawabnkmusha|gothawabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithawabmusha|gokithawabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:thawabsherasha|thawabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gothawabnksherasha|gothawabnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokithawabsherasha|gokithawabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:thawabngasha|thawabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gothawabnkngasha|gothawabnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokithawabngasha|gokithawabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thawabyasha|thawabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothawabnkyasha|gothawabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokithawabyasha|gokithawabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:thawabyamasha|thawabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gothawabnkyamasha|gothawabnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokithawabyamasha|gokithawabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:thawabn眉sh毛sha|thawabn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothawabnkn眉sh毛sha|gothawabnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithawabn眉sh毛sha|gokithawabn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thawabn眉rosha|thawabn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothawabnkn眉rosha|gothawabnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithawabn眉rosha|gokithawabn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thawabn眉musha|thawabn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothawabnkn眉musha|gothawabnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithawabn眉musha|gokithawabn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:thawabsh毛n眉sha|thawabsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothawabnksh毛n眉sha|gothawabnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithawabsh毛n眉sha|gokithawabsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thawabsh毛rosha|thawabsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothawabnksh毛rosha|gothawabnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithawabsh毛rosha|gokithawabsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thawabsh毛musha|thawabsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothawabnksh毛musha|gothawabnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithawabsh毛musha|gokithawabsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:thawabron眉sha|thawabron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothawabnkron眉sha|gothawabnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithawabron眉sha|gokithawabron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:thawabrosh毛sha|thawabrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothawabnkrosh毛sha|gothawabnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithawabrosh毛sha|gokithawabrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thawabromusha|thawabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothawabnkromusha|gothawabnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithawabromusha|gokithawabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:thawabmun眉sha|thawabmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothawabnkmun眉sha|gothawabnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithawabmun眉sha|gokithawabmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:thawabmush毛sha|thawabmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothawabnkmush毛sha|gothawabnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithawabmush毛sha|gokithawabmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thawabmurosha|thawabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothawabnkmurosha|gothawabnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithawabmurosha|gokithawabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:thawab|thawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:th忙w忙b|th忙w忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hothawab|hothawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoth忙w忙b|hoth忙w忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohothawab|hohothawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoth忙w忙b|hohoth忙w忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉thawab|n眉thawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉th忙w忙b|n眉th忙w忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉thawab|n眉n眉thawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉th忙w忙b|n眉n眉th忙w忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂thawab|n茂thawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂th忙w忙b|n茂th忙w忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂thawab|n茂n茂thawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂th忙w忙b|n茂n茂th忙w忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luthawab|luthawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luth忙w忙b|luth忙w忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluthawab|luluthawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluth忙w忙b|luluth忙w忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lithawab|lithawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lith忙w忙b|lith忙w忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilithawab|lilithawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilith忙w忙b|lilith忙w忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kothawab|kothawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koth忙w忙b|koth忙w忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokothawab|kokothawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoth忙w忙b|kokoth忙w忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kethawab|kethawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keth忙w忙b|keth忙w忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekethawab|kekethawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketh忙w忙b|keketh忙w忙b]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
